name: nest-template
description: NestJS API project template crafted for Docker environments
author: Saluki

scripts.db:test:create: docker exec tapos_db mysql -u root -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS tapos_test;"
scripts.test:setup: pnpm run db:test:create && pnpm run test:migrate
scripts.test: pnpm exec prisma generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env.test -- jest
scripts.test:migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env.test -- pnpm exec prisma generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env.test -- pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.test:all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.test:int: pnpm exec prisma generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test jest --config src/tests/jest-int.json --rootDir .
scripts.test:e2e: cross-env NODE_ENV=test pnpm run db:test:create && pnpm run test:migrate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env.test -- pnpm exec prisma generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env.test -- jest --config src/tests/jest-e2e.json --rootDir .
scripts.db:grant: docker exec tapos_db mysql -u root -proot -e "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'dev_user'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
scripts.db:setup: pnpm run db:grant && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run migrate:dev && pnpm run seed
